description: Open source Simplified Technical English word list, version 1.01

alternatives.title: accomplish
alternatives.alt_title: or use a more specific command verb

alternatives.title: adverse
alternatives.alt_title: bad (adjective). note: give accurate and correct conditions if possible

alternatives.title: affect
alternatives.alt_title: effect (noun). note: be specific if possible

alternatives.title: already
alternatives.alt_title: before this. note: you can frequently omit this word and not change the meaning of your sentence

alternatives.title: alternately
alternatives.alt_title: in one ... and then in the other

alternatives.title: carry out
alternatives.alt_title: do or other command verb construction

alternatives.title: even
alternatives.alt_title: level (adjective). note: you can frequently omit this word and not change the meaning of your sentence

alternatives.title: failure
alternatives.alt_title: if ... not. note: failure is a technical name when it means a performance error or loss of serviceability

alternatives.title: few
alternatives.alt_title: small number. note: if possible. give a specific number

alternatives.title: few (a few)
alternatives.alt_title: some (adjective). note: if this alternative is not sufficient

alternatives.title: flaw
alternatives.alt_title: defective (adjective). note: be as specific as possible

alternatives.title: just
alternatives.alt_title: only (adjective). note: you can frequently omit this word and not change the meaning of your sentence

alternatives.title: progress
alternatives.alt_title: continue (verb) note: also refer to in progress (adverb)

alternatives.title: re-
alternatives.alt_title: use the word again (adverb) or back (adverb) with the basic word to replace words that have "re-" as a prefix

alternatives.title: several
alternatives.alt_title: many (adjective). note: if these alternatives are not sufficient

alternatives.title: soon
alternatives.alt_title: time (noun). note: give the time if possible

alternatives.title: wash
alternatives.alt_title: clean note: give the nrocedure. if possible

alternatives.title: wash
alternatives.alt_title: clean (verb). note: give the procedure if possible
